[Description](#tab-description-2347)

**Gyeon Q2M PPF Wash 500ml | Cleans Decontaminates PPF & Vinyl**

Q M PPF Wash is meticulously formulated for Paint Protection Film, ensuring it removes iron deposits and contamination while preserving the material's optical clarity.

Ideal for regular wash maintenance, it utilizes a blend of foaming and decontamination agents to gently eliminate dirt, road grime, and light iron deposits in a single step. While designed for paint protection films, it's equally effective on paint and wheels, whether coated or not.**
**

**SAFE & SLICK**
While being effective against metal contamination on polyurethane film, Q M PPF Wash remains a safe shampoo on all exterior surfaces. Its formula ensures generous suds for a slick wash routine on the rest of your vehicle, coated or not.

**EASY TO USE**
Q M PPF Wash is a 3 in 1 product - it will clean, decontaminate & restore initial properties of your PPF or vinyl film. It might be used as foam or a traditional shampoo - make it a versatile maintenance solution for your vehicle.


**PRO TIP**
With the high ability to decontaminate, use Q M PPF Wash as a foam pre soak on the entire exterior of the car as well as the wheels.

CONCENTRATION: 1:500

CONSUMPTION: 20-30ml/ car

COATING SAFE: YES
